content: Alice opened and repaired the clipboard integration PR for review: https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/572. It keeps main’s workbook implementation, adds Dave’s clipboard depth, and is now clean against main.

**Ben:** Your requested changes on PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/564 were addressed and the PR is now merged. I preserved Alice's accepted visible shell, wired workbook.js underneath the shell's SpreadsheetEngine, kept the compatibility test API, ported Emma's clipboard/native event behavior, and verified workbook tests, spreadsheet tests, Alice core tests, and file:// browser smoke with no console errors.
